title: 50PCS 125mm 8 Hole Sanding Discs 240 Grit Round Sandpaper Hook and Loop Pads Yellow Random Orbital Sander Sandpaper for Wood Metal Plastic
features: P240 Sandpaper: Each package contains 50 sheets of P240 grit discs. P240 discs are designed for delicate final sanding between topcoats, polishing minor imperfections.

Premium Material: Made from high-quality aluminum oxide abrasive, these sanding discs are exceptionally hard and durable. They deliver consistently sharp cutting action for efficient sanding and extended lifespan compared to ordinary sandpaper.

8-Hole Dust Extraction: Equipped with an 8-hole dust extraction system on the hook & loop backing, these sanding pads capture dust directly at the source for a cleaner workspace, better visibility, faster sanding, and improved user comfort and health.

Hook & Loop Backing: Compatible with 5" random orbital sanders, the hook & loop backing allows for tool-free grit changes in seconds. Simply press to attach and peel to release—keeping your workflow seamless and uninterrupted from start to finish.

Wide Applications: Designed for final polishing and delicate smoothing on wood, fine metals, and plastics. Ideal for achieving a glass-like finish on turned wood projects, preparing model surfaces for painting, and buffing out minor imperfections.
description: Product Specifications: Diameter: 125mm (5 Inches) Grit Included: P240 Package Quantity: 50 PCS Backing: Hook & Loop Abrasive Material: Aluminum Oxide
